zh.Julich, Rheinland, Prussia: 德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫爾利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Wilhelm II. von Jülich於大約1325年出生在爾利時，他的父親Wilhelm von Jülich27歲，母親Jeanne de Hainaut16歲。他於1362年12月25日與Marie von Guelders結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1393年12月13日在他的家鄉享年69歲。

zh-hans.Julich, Rheinland, Prussia: 德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫爾利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Wilhelm II. von Jülich于大约1325年出生在爾利时，他的父亲Wilhelm von Jülich27岁，母亲Jeanne de Hainaut16岁。他于1362年12月25日与Marie von Guelders结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1393年12月13日在他的家乡享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Jülich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto.

variants.name: Juhl
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Arno, Erwin, Heinz, Kurt.

Danish and Norwegian: nickname for someone who was born on Christmas Day or had some other connection with this time of year, from Old Norse jól. This was originally the name of a pagan midwinter festival, which was later appropriated by the Christian Church for celebration of the birth of Christ.
German (of Slavic origin): nickname or topographic name from a Germanized Slavic stem gol ‘naked, barren’.

nameMeanings.name: Wilhelm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from wil ‘will’ + helm ‘helmet’; an ancient royal name. See also William .

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: II.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Wilhelm II. von Jülich was born about 1325, in Jülich, his father, Wilhelm von Jülich, was 27 and his mother, Jeanne de Hainaut, was 16. He married Marie von Guelders on 25 December 1362. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 13 December 1393, in his hometown, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Wilhelm II. von Jülich est né environ 1325, à Jülich, son père, Wilhelm von Jülich, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Hainaut, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Marie von Guelders le 25 décembre 1362. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 13 décembre 1393, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Wilhelm II. von Jülich um 1325 in Jülich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Wilhelm von Jülich 27 und seine Mutter Jeanne de Hainaut 16. Er hat am 25. Dezember 1362 Marie von Guelders geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. Dezember 1393 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Wilhelm II. von Jülich è nato il circa 1325 nel Jülich, il suo padre, Wilhelm von Jülich, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne de Hainaut, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Marie von Guelders il 25 dicembre 1362. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 13 dicembre 1393, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.Julich, Rheinland, Prussia: ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンジuリチ
ja.lifeSummary: Wilhelm II. von Jülichが約1325年にジuリチで生まれた時，父Wilhelm von Jülichは27歳，母Jeanne de Hainautは16歳であった。1362年12月25日にMarie von Gueldersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1393年12月13日に故郷で69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Wilhelm II. von Jülich(이)가 대략 1325년 제이u리치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Wilhelm von Jülich(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne de Hainaut(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1362년 12월 25일 Marie von Guelders(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1393년 12월 13일 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Wilhelm II. von Jülich nasceu aproximadamente 1325, em Jülich, seu pai, Wilhelm von Jülich, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Hainaut, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Marie von Guelders em 25 de dezembro de 1362. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 13 de dezembro de 1393, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Wilhelm II. von Jülich родился около 1325 г. в местности джuлич, его отцу по имени Wilhelm von Jülich было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Hainaut, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie von Guelders 25 декабря 1362 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 13 декабря 1393 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет.

sm.1361-1393: mai le 1361 e o'o I le 1393

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Wilhelm II. von Jülich nació aproximadamente 1325, en Jülich, su papá, Wilhelm von Jülich, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Hainaut, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Marie von Guelders el 25 de diciembre de 1362. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 13 de diciembre de 1393, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años.
